content.text: Yes! We went away from a costum UI on the menubar/tray app to a native menubar look + a window for Web UI to be shown. It feels much simpler now
content.html: Yes! We went away from a costum UI on the menubar/tray app to a native menubar look + a window for Web UI to be shown. It feels much simpler now

content.text: Time to try @IPFSbot Desktop again, as it's been since the "Station" naming that I've given it a spin. Glad to see the move away from the UI with breathable whitespace to a more native UI approach, at least in the Finder/Explorer.
